description: Filter and allowlist policy for cowork-starter-kit upstream content integration (ADR-023). Fail-closed: any file or category not listed here is BLOCKED.

blocked_files.reason: Permanently blocked per A-v2.0-7 — describes NEXUS framework orchestration internals. Cowork-starter-kit does not distribute orchestration strategy content from upstream.

blocked_patterns.reason: Exact filename block — catches nexus-strategy.md at any path depth (rename-into-category attack prevention)
Extension variants of nexus-strategy (e.g., nexus-strategy.txt, nexus-strategy.yaml)
Orchestration controller files not allowlisted for distribution
Meta-agent descriptor files not allowlisted for distribution
Pipeline controller files not allowlisted for distribution
The-Council internal references permanently blocked from upstream distribution
Cowork orchestrator internals permanently blocked from upstream distribution

notes: allowed_categories lists folder-level allowlist. /sync-agency only fetches files whose path's first segment matches an entry here.
Unknown category folders are BLOCKED by default (fail-closed).
blocked_files entries block specific file paths by exact match.
blocked_patterns entries block filenames matching the pattern at any path depth.
requires_review lists allowlisted files flagged for user-visible WARNING at install time.
Deferred from v2.0: game-development and spatial-computing (high quality variance — re-evaluate at v2.1 per ADR-023).
